specificResults: A Claude Cowork system that receives a transcription of a supervision meeting and produces a supervision report
coer.reason:
- It reduce my time spent on supervisions for Julia Roso
- It will deepen my skills in Claude Cowork
coer.corporateContribution:
1. Increase the quality of supervisions for BSC - better facilitators
2. May support Community of Practice
consequencesAchieving: Standardization of reports - better knowledge management
consequencesNotAchieving: Reports get delayed due to competing timed priorities
coer.startingPoint:
Claudio & Kate have discussed and agreed the first step is to define Core Competencies (CC)
Kate agreed to provide the reference material against which CC will be measured against
Claudio will create and manage the Cowork project
stakeholders: Other Didacts interested in the project and CC definition
obstacles: Losing focus due to other priorities
No pressing Q1 supervisions apart from Julia Roso - leading to lower urgency and priority
